---
title: "Luka Saxena"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/luka-saxena
    - text: ORCiD
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-8474-6383
toc: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 20
#| fig-align: center

library(ggplot2)

library(ggplot2)

hobbies <- data.frame(
  label  = c("skiing", "gym", "soccer", "diy", "dogs & cats",
             "9-5 beach in summer", "airshow enthusiast",
             "chronically on reels", "random outdoor adventures"),
  y      = c(9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1),
  fill   = c("#1a3a3a", "#1e1a3a", "#1a3a3a", "#1e1a3a", "#1a3a3a",
             "#1e1a3a", "#1a3a3a", "#1e1a3a", "#1a3a3a"),
  accent = c("#39d0d8", "#7c6af7", "#39d0d8", "#7c6af7", "#39d0d8",
             "#7c6af7", "#39d0d8", "#7c6af7", "#39d0d8")
)

ggplot(hobbies, aes(x = 0, y = y)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = fill), width = 2, height = 0.82,
            colour = "#30363d", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label, colour = accent),
            hjust = 0.5, size = 10, fontface = "bold", family = "mono") +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_colour_identity() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.4, 9.6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1.2, 1.2)) +
  labs(title = "When I'm not held captive to my screen...") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#0d1117", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#0d1117", colour = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(
      family = "mono", colour = "#e6edf3", size = 40,
      hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 20)
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(30, 40, 30, 40)
  )

```
